scenarios.name: asks for module path when not provided
scenarios.prompt: Write tests for my terraform module

scenarios.name: generates mock file in tests/mocks directory
scenarios.prompt: Write basic tests for the terraform module at terraform/modules/s3. Describe the file structure including any mock files.

scenarios.name: uses command=apply for outputs
scenarios.prompt: In terraform test files, when testing module outputs that reference computed attributes like IDs, what value should the command field be set to?

scenarios.name: does not put mock_provider in tfmock file
scenarios.prompt: In terraform native testing, what block type should be used in a .tfmock.hcl file to mock an aws_vpc data source? What block type must NOT appear in that file?
